Interface UserJpaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
BaseRepositoryCustom<User>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<User,Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<User,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<User,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<User,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<User,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<User>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<User,Integer>, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<User>, UserJpaRepositoryCustom
public interface UserJpaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<User,Integer>, UserJpaRepositoryCustom, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<User>

  • Method Details

    • findByEmail

      Optional<User> findByEmail(String username)

    • findByNickname

      Optional<User> findByNickname(String nickname)

    • findByIdTenant

      Optional<User> findByIdTenant(Integer idTenant)

    • findByIdTenantAndHomeTenantReadOnlyTrue

      List<User> findByIdTenantAndHomeTenantReadOnlyTrue(Integer idTenant)
      Returns all pure read-only viewer logins co-resident on the given tenant: users whose home tenant is this tenant and who are flagged read-only on it. Used to list the people a tenant owner has granted a dedicated read-only login to.
      Parameters:
      idTenant - the tenant whose read-only viewer logins are requested
      Returns:
      the list of read-only viewer users, possibly empty

    • findFirstByIdTenantAndHomeTenantReadOnlyFalse

      Optional<User> findFirstByIdTenantAndHomeTenantReadOnlyFalse(Integer idTenant)
      Returns the writable owner of a tenant: the (first) user whose home tenant is this tenant and who is not flagged read-only on it. Used to label a tenant by its owner's e-mail even when read-only viewer logins also reside on it.
      Parameters:
      idTenant - the tenant whose owner is requested
      Returns:
      the owner user if one exists, otherwise empty

    • findByIdTenantAndIdUser

      User findByIdTenantAndIdUser(Integer idTenant, Integer idUser)

    • findByIdUserAndIdTenant

      UserOwnProjection findByIdUserAndIdTenant(Integer idUser, Integer idTenant)

    • findAllByOrderByIdUserAsc

      List<User> findAllByOrderByIdUserAsc()

    • countByEnabled

      int countByEnabled(boolean value)

    • findIdUserAndLocaleStrByIdUsers

      @Query("SELECT u.idUser AS idUser, u.localeStr AS localeStr FROM User u WHERE u.idUser IN ?1") List<UserJpaRepository.IdUserLocale> findIdUserAndLocaleStrByIdUsers(List<Integer> idUsers)

    • removeWithExpiredVerificationToken

      @UpdateQuery(value="DELETE u FROM user u JOIN verificationtoken v ON u.id_user = v.id_user\nWHERE u.id_tenant IS NULL AND v.expiry_date < NOW()", nativeQuery=true) void removeWithExpiredVerificationToken()

    • getIdUserAndNicknameExcludeUser

      @Query(value="SELECT u.id_user AS idUser, u.nickname FROM user u WHERE u.id_user <> ?1", nativeQuery=true) List<UserJpaRepository.IdUserAndNickname> getIdUserAndNicknameExcludeUser(Integer idUser)

    • getUsersByMailPattern

      @Query(value="SELECT u.* FROM user u WHERE u.email REGEXP ?1", nativeQuery=true) List<User> getUsersByMailPattern(String mailPattern)

    • moveCreatedByUserToOtherUser

      @Query(value="CALL moveCreatedByUserToOtherUser(:fromIdUser, :toIdUser, :schemaName);", nativeQuery=true) Integer moveCreatedByUserToOtherUser(@Param("fromIdUser") Integer fromIdUser, @Param("toIdUser") Integer toIdUser, @Param("schemaName") String schemaName)
      Moves shared data from one user to another. It is assumed that shared data has a field 'created_by', whereby tables beginning with "user" are excluded.

    • getIdUserAndNicknameByRoleExcludeUser

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) List<UserJpaRepository.IdUserAndNickname> getIdUserAndNicknameByRoleExcludeUser(String roleName, Integer exludeIdUser)
      Fetches all users’ IDs and nicknames in the given role—except for one user. This projection is used when you want to list everyone in a role (e.g. to populate a UI dropdown) but exclude a specific user (typically the current user).
      Parameters:
      roleName - the name of the role whose members should be returned
      excludeUserId - the user ID to omit from the result set
      Returns:
      a list of projections (UserJpaRepository.IdUserAndNickname), each containing an enabled user’s ID and nickname

    • getEmailExcludeWhenMsgComTypeAndTargetTypeExists

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) List<UserJpaRepository.EMailLocale> getEmailExcludeWhenMsgComTypeAndTargetTypeExists(Byte messageComType, Byte messageTargetType)
      Retrieves users’ email addresses and locales *only* if they have no forwarding rule for the specified communication and target types. This prevents sending a direct email when a mail‐forwarding setting already applies.
      Parameters:
      messageComType - the communication type to check (e.g. system vs. user messages)
      messageTargetType - the target type to check (e.g. email vs. internal messaging)
      Returns:
      a list of UserJpaRepository.EMailLocale projections (email + locale); empty if every user has a matching forwarding rule
